debug_info.goal:
case h
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
D : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
hmax : IsMin D
x y : PersistenceSubmodule M
hxy : Disjoint x y
hN : x ⊔ y ∈ D
hx : ¬x = ⊥
hy : ¬y = ⊥
B : (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) → N ∈ D → Set (PersistenceSubmodule M) := fun N hN => if N = x ⊔ y then {x, y} else {N}
newD : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M :=
  @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition.refinement C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M D B ⋯ ⋯ ⋯
h : {x, y} = {x ⊔ y}
⊢ False

failed_attempts:
have : x ∈ ({x, y} : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)) := by simp
      simpa [h] using this
    have hy' : y = x ⊔ y := by
      have : y ∈ ({x, y} : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)) := by simp
      simpa [h] using this
    have hxy' : x = y := by simpa [hx'] using hy'.symm
    have : x = ⊥ := by
      have : x ⊓ y = ⊥ := disjoint_iff.mp hxy
      have : x ⊓ x = ⊥ := by simpa [hxy'] using this
      simpa using this
    exact hx this

have : x ∈ ({x, y} : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)) := by simp
      have : x ∈ ({x ⊔ y} : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)) := by simpa [h] using this
      simpa using this
    have hy' : y = x ⊔ y := by
      have : y ∈ ({x, y} : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)) := by simp
      have : y ∈ ({x ⊔ y} : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)) := by simpa [h] using this
      simpa using this
    have hxy' : x = y := by simpa [hx', hy'] using rfl
    have : x = ⊥ := by
      have : Disjoint x x := by simpa [hxy'] using hxy
      simpa [disjoint_self] using this
    exact hx this

simpa [h] using (Set.mem_insert x {y})
      have hx'' : x = x ⊔ y := by
        simpa [Set.mem_singleton_iff] using hx'
      exact hx (hx'' ▸ sup_eq_left.2 le_sup_left)

have : x ∈ ({x ⊔ y} : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)) := by
        simpa [h] using (Set.mem_insert x {y})
      simpa using this
    exact hx (by
      have : x ⊔ y = x := le_antisymm (sup_le (le_of_eq hx'.symm) (le_trans le_sup_right (hx' ▸ le_rfl))) le_sup_left
      simpa [this] using hx')

have : x ∈ ({x, y} : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)) := by simp
      have : x ∈ ({x ⊔ y} : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)) := by simpa [h] using this
      simpa using this
    have hy' : y = x ⊔ y := by
      have : y ∈ ({x, y} : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)) := by simp
      have : y ∈ ({x ⊔ y} : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)) := by simpa [h] using this
      simpa using this
    have : (x ⊓ y : PersistenceSubmodule M) = ⊥ := by
      exact disjoint_iff.mp hxy
    have : x = (⊥ : PersistenceSubmodule M) := by
      calc
        x = x ⊓ y := by simpa [hx', hy', sup_eq_left, le_rfl]
        _ = ⊥ := this
    exact hx this

have hxmem : x ∈ ({x, y} : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)) := by simp
        simpa [h] using hxmem
      exact hx (sup_eq_left.mp hx')

have : x ∈ ({x, y} : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)) := by simp
      have : x ∈ ({x ⊔ y} : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)) := by simpa [h] using this
      simpa using this
    have hy' : y = x ⊔ y := by
      have : y ∈ ({x, y} : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)) := by simp
      have : y ∈ ({x ⊔ y} : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)) := by simpa [h] using this
      simpa using this

    have : x = ⊥ := by
      have hxy' : Disjoint x x := by simpa [this] using hxy
      exact disjoint_self.mp hxy'
